class="w-full flex flex-col px-2 | xl:w-1/2"><div

x-data="accordion" class="w-full" x-on:click.away="open = false"><div
class="transition mb-5 ">
<button
class="transition w-full flex font-sans-primary font-medium text-md text-left cursor-pointer py-6 pl-11 pr-6 bg-primary-100 | md:text-lg | focus:outline-none"
x-bind:class="{
'text-primary-700 rounded-t-20 rounded-b-20 | hover:text-primary-600' : open != 'accordion-0',
'rounded-t-20 text-primary-600 ' : open == 'accordion-0'
}"
x-on:click="open = open == 'accordion-0' ? false : 'accordion-0'"
x-bind:aria-expanded="open == 'accordion-0' ? true : false"
><p>How much should I be spending on marketing?</p><div
class="transition flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm ml-auto rounded-full w-6 h-6 | md:w-8 md:h-8"
x-bind:class="{
'bg-primary-600 border border-primary-600 text-white' : open != 'accordion-0',
'bg-primary-600 text-white' : open == 'accordion-0'
}"
>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-down" x-show="open != 'accordion-0'"></i>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-up" x-show="open == 'accordion-0'"></i></div>
</button><div
class="bg-primary-100 rounded-b-20" x-show="open == 'accordion-0'" x-collapse.duration.0ms x-cloak><div
class="text-primary-600 pb-10 pt-3 px-11 text-sm | md:text-base "><p>This is one of the most common questions we get and there is no one size fits all answer. How much you should be spending and how much you can afford to be spending are not always the same. If you have huge budgets you will always be able to do more, but if your budgets are small then you need to decide what you want your marketing to achieve e.g. instant enquiries, brand awareness, more website visits, and then plan your activity around what you can afford to do to achieve that. Our team have got experience dealing with very small budgets to multi-million-pound budgets, no matter what, we always aim to maximise your spend for the best results.</p></div></div></div><div
class="transition mb-5 ">
<button
class="transition w-full flex font-sans-primary font-medium text-md text-left cursor-pointer py-6 pl-11 pr-6 bg-primary-100 | md:text-lg | focus:outline-none"
x-bind:class="{
'text-primary-700 rounded-t-20 rounded-b-20 | hover:text-primary-600' : open != 'accordion-1',
'rounded-t-20 text-primary-600 ' : open == 'accordion-1'
}"
x-on:click="open = open == 'accordion-1' ? false : 'accordion-1'"
x-bind:aria-expanded="open == 'accordion-1' ? true : false"
><p>Do you work with clients outside of the UK?</p><div
class="transition flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm ml-auto rounded-full w-6 h-6 | md:w-8 md:h-8"
x-bind:class="{
'bg-primary-600 border border-primary-600 text-white' : open != 'accordion-1',
'bg-primary-600 text-white' : open == 'accordion-1'
}"
>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-down" x-show="open != 'accordion-1'"></i>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-up" x-show="open == 'accordion-1'"></i></div>
</button><div
class="bg-primary-100 rounded-b-20" x-show="open == 'accordion-1'" x-collapse.duration.0ms x-cloak><div
class="text-primary-600 pb-10 pt-3 px-11 text-sm | md:text-base "><p>We sure do. Our team has got 20 years of combined experience working with clients and managing teams across the UK, Europe, Africa The Middle East, Asia and Australia. Not only are we used to working across different timezones, but our experience in these markets means we understand the differences between customers across those regions as well. Plus we love a trip... the sunnier and warmer your location, the higher the chances of us working together.</p></div></div></div><div
class="transition mb-5 ">
<button
class="transition w-full flex font-sans-primary font-medium text-md text-left cursor-pointer py-6 pl-11 pr-6 bg-primary-100 | md:text-lg | focus:outline-none"
x-bind:class="{
'text-primary-700 rounded-t-20 rounded-b-20 | hover:text-primary-600' : open != 'accordion-2',
'rounded-t-20 text-primary-600 ' : open == 'accordion-2'
}"
x-on:click="open = open == 'accordion-2' ? false : 'accordion-2'"
x-bind:aria-expanded="open == 'accordion-2' ? true : false"
><p>How does your pricing work?</p><div
class="transition flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm ml-auto rounded-full w-6 h-6 | md:w-8 md:h-8"
x-bind:class="{
'bg-primary-600 border border-primary-600 text-white' : open != 'accordion-2',
'bg-primary-600 text-white' : open == 'accordion-2'
}"
>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-down" x-show="open != 'accordion-2'"></i>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-up" x-show="open == 'accordion-2'"></i></div>
</button><div
class="bg-primary-100 rounded-b-20" x-show="open == 'accordion-2'" x-collapse.duration.0ms x-cloak><div
class="text-primary-600 pb-10 pt-3 px-11 text-sm | md:text-base "><p>We have two pricing models.</p><p>1. Long-term retainers</p><p>When we are working with a client long-term, we are able to offer economies of scale on our time, the longer, more frequently we work together, the lower the cost. Retainers are charged on a monthly basis on any project lasting longer than 3 months.</p><p>2. One off-projects</p><p>Just need help creating a new website, a new brand identity, or LinkedIn training for your team? No problem. As well as working with clients on a long-term basis, we also help brands and businesses who need help with short term, one-off projects.</p></div></div></div><div
class="transition mb-5 ">
<button
class="transition w-full flex font-sans-primary font-medium text-md text-left cursor-pointer py-6 pl-11 pr-6 bg-primary-100 | md:text-lg | focus:outline-none"
x-bind:class="{
'text-primary-700 rounded-t-20 rounded-b-20 | hover:text-primary-600' : open != 'accordion-3',
'rounded-t-20 text-primary-600 ' : open == 'accordion-3'
}"
x-on:click="open = open == 'accordion-3' ? false : 'accordion-3'"
x-bind:aria-expanded="open == 'accordion-3' ? true : false"
><p>How do you measure results?</p><div
class="transition flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm ml-auto rounded-full w-6 h-6 | md:w-8 md:h-8"
x-bind:class="{
'bg-primary-600 border border-primary-600 text-white' : open != 'accordion-3',
'bg-primary-600 text-white' : open == 'accordion-3'
}"
>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-down" x-show="open != 'accordion-3'"></i>
<i
class="fa-regular fa-arrow-up" x-show="open == 'accordion-3'"></i></div>
</button><div
class="bg-primary-100 rounded-b-20" x-show="open == 'accordion-3'" x-collapse.duration.0ms x-cloak><div
class="text-primary-600 pb-10 pt-3 px-11 text-sm | md:text-base "><p>We live by the mantra, 'If you aren't measuring, then you aren't marketing. You're gambling'. But, 'how' we measure results is always driven by 'what' we are measuring. First of all we need to understand what your objectives are as a business, and build a plan for how marketing can support those aims. If your strategy is 100% offline activity, then analytics tools are going to be no good to you. Likewise if your strategy is all digital, then only using qualitative feedback from your customers isn't going to give you the data you need to optimise. Just know this, if it can be done, it can be measured.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div

                        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
                        xhr.onload = function () {
                            if (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status <= 299) {
                                var tokenInfo = JSON.parse(this.responseText);
                                window.csrfTokenValue = tokenInfo.token;
                                window.csrfTokenName = tokenInfo.name;
                                for (var i=0; i<len; i++) {
                                    inputs[i].setAttribute("value", tokenInfo.token);
                                }
                                window.dispatchEvent( new CustomEvent("servd.csrfloaded", {detail: {token: tokenInfo.token}}) );
                            } else {
                                window.dispatchEvent( new CustomEvent("servd.csrffailed") );
                            }

                        };
                        xhr.open("GET", "https://wearecoandco.com/index.php/actions/servd-asset-storage/csrf-token/get-token");
                        xhr.send();
                    }
                }
                setTimeout(function(){
                    if (!window.SERVD_MANUAL_CSRF_LOAD) {
                        injectCSRF();
                    }
                }, 50);

document.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => {
        Alpine.data('cursor', () => ({
            showCursor: false,
            dragCursor(id) {

                _self = this

                let hideCursor = document.querySelectorAll('.js-hide-drag-cursor');

                hideCursor.forEach(function (element) {
                    element.addEventListener('mouseover', function () {
                        document.querySelector('.js-drag-cursor-outer-' + id).classList.add('opacity-0');                        
                    });
                    element.addEventListener('mouseout', function () {
                        document.querySelector('.js-drag-cursor-outer-' + id).classList.remove('opacity-0');                        
                    });
                });

                function positionCursor(event, container, cursor) {

                    containerBounds = container.getBoundingClientRect()

                    let positionX = (event.pageX - containerBounds.left)
                    let positionY = ((event.pageY  - containerBounds.top) - window.scrollY)

                    TweenMax.to(cursor, 0.01, { x: positionX, y: positionY })

                }

                Array.prototype.forEach.call(
                    document.querySelectorAll('.js-drag-cursor-' + id + '__container'),
                    function(container) {

                        const cursor = document.querySelector('.js-drag-cursor-' + id)

                        TweenMax.set(
                            cursor, { 
                                xPercent: -50,
                                    yPercent: -50 
                            }
                        )

                        container.addEventListener(
                            'pointerenter',
                            function(event) {
                                
                                TweenMax.to(cursor, 0.6, { scale: 1, opacity: 1 })
                                positionCursor(event, container, cursor)

                            }
                        )

                        container.addEventListener(
                            'pointermove',
                            function(event) {
                                
                                positionCursor(event, container, cursor)

                            }
                        )

                    }
                )

            }
        }))
    });

document.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => {
        Alpine.data('footerCta', () => ({
            carouselFooter(id) { 

                const carousel = document.querySelector('.js-carousel--' + id);
                const next = document.querySelector('.js-carousel-next--' + id);
                const prev = document.querySelector('.js-carousel-prev--' + id);

                const swiper = new Swiper(
                    carousel,
                    {
                        slidesPerView: '1',
                        spaceBetween: 30,
                        // direction: 'vertical',
                        loop: true,
                        speed: 7500,
                        grabCursor: false,
                        pauseOnMouseEnter: false,
                        mousewheelControl: false,
                        keyboardControl: false,
                        autoHeight: false,
                        initialSlide: 0,
                        autoplay: {
                            delay: false,
                            disableOnInteraction: false,
                        }
                    }

                );

            },

            init() {
                 document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
                    const serviceTitles = document.querySelectorAll(".service-title");
                    const container = document.querySelector(".flex.flex-col"); // Container element
                    const timeline = gsap.timeline({ repeat: -1 });

                    // Calculate total height of all service title elements
                    let totalHeight = 0;
                    serviceTitles.forEach((title) => {
                        totalHeight += title.offsetHeight;
                    });

                    // Create animation sequence
                    timeline.to(
                        serviceTitles,
                        {
                            y: -totalHeight,
                            duration: totalHeight / 50, // Adjust the scroll speed
                            stagger: 0.5, // Adjust the delay between each title
                            ease: "power0",
                        },
                        0 // Position the start time of the animation
                    );


                    // Reset the positions after each loop iteration
                    timeline.add(() => {
                        totalHeight += 100;
                        gsap.set(serviceTitles, { y: totalHeight });
                    });

                    // Intersection Observer for color change
                    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
                        entries.forEach(entry => {
                            const title = entry.target;
                            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                                gsap.to(title, { color: "#ffffff", duration: 0.5 }); // Change color when entering viewport
                            } else {
                                gsap.to(title, { color: "#A5A5A4", duration: 0.5 }); // Change color when exiting viewport
                            }
                        });
                    }, { threshold: 0.5 }); // Adjust the threshold value as needed

                    // Observe each service title
                    serviceTitles.forEach(title => {
                        observer.observe(title);
                    });
                });
            }

        }))
    });
